message:
fix(cli): improve input validation and whitespace handling

Multiple fixes and improvements across CLI commands and formatting:

Create command (src/cli/commands/create.rs):
- Trim labels before validation to accept "  label  " as "label"
- Treat whitespace-only dates as None instead of parse failures
- Add test for label trimming behavior

Lint/Stale/Stats commands:
- Simplify implementations by removing redundant code
- Minor consistency improvements

Formatting (src/format/rich.rs, src/format/theme.rs):
- Adjust output formatting for better alignment
- Update theme color handling

Sync (src/sync/mod.rs):
- Simplify sync logic by removing unnecessary complexity

Tests:
- Expand e2e_stale.rs test coverage
- Update benchmark datasets and baseline tests
- Update test utilities in tests/common/mod.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
